summary: Bug fix and new feature testing complete. Deployment delete bug fix verified (SyntaxError in equipment.py was fixed). Loss tickets feature fully functional with UI in Alertes tab. All 8 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI testing successful - tickets display correctly with update modal, status badges, and action buttons.

bug_fix.DELETE /api/deployments/{id}: PASS - Deployment deletion now works correctly (was broken due to SyntaxError)

backend_apis.GET /api/loss-tickets: PASS - Returns list of loss/theft/damage tickets
backend_apis.POST /api/loss-tickets: PASS - Creates new ticket with email notification
backend_apis.PUT /api/loss-tickets/{id}: PASS - Updates ticket status and adds message to history
backend_apis.POST /api/loss-tickets/{id}/remind: PASS - Sends reminder email (requires admin role)
backend_apis.POST /api/deployments/{id}/return: PASS - Creates reminders for lost/stolen/damaged items

frontend_ui.Alertes Tab: PASS - Shows two sections: 'Tickets Pertes/Vols/Casses' and 'Alertes équipement'
frontend_ui.Ticket Cards: PASS - Display type badge (PERDU/VOLÉ/ENDOMMAGÉ), equipment name, deployment info, date, status
frontend_ui.Badge Count: PASS - Shows correct count of active tickets on Alertes tab
frontend_ui.Update Modal: PASS - Opens with status dropdown, message textarea, estimated date field
frontend_ui.Status Options: PASS - En attente, Commande en cours, Assurance en cours, Résolu, Obsolète
frontend_ui.Relancer Button: PASS - Visible for sending reminder emails
frontend_ui.Delete Button: PASS - Trash icon visible for deleting tickets
frontend_ui.Deployments Tab: PASS - Shows deployment cards with PDF, Détails, Modifier, Delete buttons

critical_code_review_comments: Loss tickets feature well implemented with proper CRUD operations
Email notifications sent on ticket creation and reminders
Ticket status history maintained with messages array
Frontend UI properly displays tickets with data-testid attributes for testing
Deployment delete bug was caused by SyntaxError (backslash in f-string) - now fixed
seed_data_creation: Used existing tickets in DB for testing. Created and cleaned up test equipment and tickets during pytest runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Loss tickets feature is fully functional. Backend APIs at /api/loss-tickets work correctly. Frontend Alertes tab at /admin/equipment shows tickets with update modal. Deployment delete bug is fixed. Email notifications are sent to communication@creativindustry.com on ticket creation and reminders.
